must_have_quals: Bachelors degree in Business, Management, Economics, Accounting, Finance, or Computer and Information Science required, 1-2 years of academic and/or professional experience in Data Manipulation Software (e.g., SQL, Python, Pandas), Demonstrated abilities to manipulate, analyze, and interpret large amounts of data and to organize findings and translate them into actionable insights using original or innovative techniques, Extremely organized with great attention to detail, Excellent ability to analyze information and think systematically, Works well independently and as part of a team, Ability to handle databases and understand technology-driven business tools, A sense of curiosity and desire to learn!
core_responsibilities: Automate data-driven tasks; design processes that require zero intervention, Work cross-functionally within the organization to deliver integrated business solutions, Provide ad-hoc data analysis, utilizing Python, PySpark, and SQL to identify and forecast trends and conduct deep-dive quantitative analyses to optimize client marketing performance, Use best-in-class tools like Databricks, and Tableau to empower insightful analysis for advertising partners
job_summary: Tatari is on a mission to revolutionize TV advertising through the intelligent application of AI and machine learning. They are seeking a Data Science Analyst to work in a fast-paced environment, collaborating with technology teams to build scalable and automated solutions for diverse data challenges.
